news.t: This fund is designed to help investors withstand wild market swings

overview.description: The Fairlead Tactical Sector ETF (TACK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund relies on a proprietary, technical model to actively manage a US large-cap sector rotation strategy. During periods deemed risk-off, the fund toggles the exposure to short- or long-term US Treasurys or gold TACK was launched on Mar 23, 2022 and is issued by Fairlead.

data.title: This fund is designed to help investors withstand wild market swings
data.text: Katie Stockton manages the Fairlead Tactical Sector ETF, which can allocate and reallocate resources during volatility rather than being tied to an index.

data.title: A different 'tack' for rough markets: How one ETF keeps moving to mitigate stock losses
data.text: Katie Stockton, Fairlead Strategies founder, joins CNBC's Bob Pisani on 'ETF Edge' to discuss the strategy behind her Fairlead Tactical ETF (TACK) that seeks to stay invested in top sectors of the mar...

data.title: Fairlead Tactical Sector Fund: Want to make sure we're in areas with long-term momentum
